tasks.label: Build and Run Pong
tasks.command: nasm -f elf32 multiboot.asm -o multiboot.o && g++ -m32 -c main.cpp -o main.o -ffreestanding -O2 -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -w && ld -m elf_i386 -T linker.ld multiboot.o main.o -o iso_root/boot/kernel.bin && grub-mkrescue -o pong.iso iso_root && if [ -f "copy_over.sh" ]; then chmod +x copy_over.sh && ./copy_over.sh; fi && qemu-system-i386 -cdrom pong.iso
